diagnostics: I am an AI Engineer. I am running a diagnostic test, i'm going to ask you some questions. Please respond in a factual and concise manner and to the point.
Are you an AI model or a human?
What is your purpose in this application?
Do you have current conversation context within this session? i.e. do you remember the previous messages in the conversation? Yes or No
Do you use RAG to assist in your responses?
Do your tools support model context protocol?
